changelog: Fixed Create Config Group SQL error (wrong WHMCS table names)
Display Name now defaults to actual resource name instead of UUID (Images, Flavors)
Added Projects and Security Groups tabs in CloudPe CMP Manager
Product module configuration: converted fields to dropdowns (Flavor, Image, Region, Security Group, Storage Policy) with curated admin selections
Added per-product Project override and Default Disk Size dropdown
Security groups are now applied at VM creation
Hid ns1/ns2 nameserver fields on order configure page for CloudPe CMP products
